arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَحَطَّةِ الْقِطَارِ لِأُسَافِرَ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ أُخْرَى. اشْتَرَيْتُ تَذْكِرَةَ الذَّهَابِ وَالْعَوْدَةِ مِنَ الشُّبَّاكِ. رَكِبْتُ الْقِطَارَ السَّرِيعَ فِي السَّاعَةِ الْعَاشِرَةِ. جَلَسْتُ بِجَانِبِ النَّافِذَةِ لِأُشَاهِدَ الْمَنَاظِرَ الطَّبِيعِيَّةَ. وَصَلَ الْقِطَارُ فِي مَوْعِدِهِ الْمُحَدَّدِ دُونَ تَأْخِيرٍ.
translation: Otišao sam na željezničku stanicu kako bih otputovao u drugi grad. Kupio sam povratnu kartu na šalteru. Ušao sam u brzi voz u deset sati. Sjeo sam pored prozora da posmatram prirodne pejzaže. Voz je stigao u zakazano vrijeme bez kašnjenja.
translationEn: I went to the train station to travel to another city. I bought a round-trip ticket from the window. I boarded the high-speed train at ten o'clock. I sat by the window to watch the natural landscapes. The train arrived at its scheduled time without delay.
